sentences.english: Hello and welcome to The English We Speak, where we explain phrases used by fluent English speakers so that you can use them too.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요, 유창한 영어 화자들이 쓰는 표현을 설명하는 The English We Speak에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

sentences.english: I'm Feifei, and I'm here with Phil.
sentences.korean: 저는 페이페이이고, 필과 함께합니다.

sentences.english: Hello. Sorry I'm late, but you know, it's not my fault.
sentences.korean: 안녕. 늦어서 미안한데, 내 잘못이 아니야.

sentences.english: The traffic was bad, and that's completely out of my control.
sentences.korean: 교통이 안 좋았는데, 그건 완전히 내가 어쩔 수 없는 거잖아.

sentences.english: I'm sorry, I'm not having that!
sentences.korean: 미안하지만 그건 안 통해!

quiz.question: What does '내 통제 밖의' mean in English?

sentences.english: The traffic is always bad – you should know that.
sentences.korean: 교통은 항상 나쁘잖아 — 그걸 알아야지.

sentences.english: If you're late because you haven't left enough time, well, that's on you, I'm afraid!
sentences.korean: 충분한 시간을 안 두고 나와서 늦은 거면, 그건 네 탓이야!

sentences.english: It's your fault. Do better next time.
sentences.korean: 네 잘못이라고. 다음엔 더 잘해.

sentences.english: OK, so maybe that was my fault, but at least it gives us the phrase to look at for this episode – 'It's on you'.
sentences.korean: 좋아, 아마 내 잘못이었겠지만, 적어도 이번 에피소드에서 다룰 표현이 생겼네 — 'It's on you'.

sentences.english: We use 'it's on you' to say 'it's your fault', and especially as a reminder to someone who doesn't want to admit responsibility.
sentences.korean: 'It's on you'는 '네 잘못이야'라는 뜻으로, 특히 책임을 인정하기 싫어하는 사람에게 상기시킬 때 써.

quiz.question: What does '네 잘못이야, 네 책임이야' mean in English?

sentences.english: Yes. If someone is having problems because they failed to prepare, then those problems 'are on them', and they should take responsibility.
sentences.korean: 맞아요. 누군가 준비를 안 해서 문제가 생겼다면, 그 문제는 '그 사람 탓'이고, 책임을 져야 해요.

sentences.english: For example, if you come to work at the wrong time because you didn't read your schedule, it's on you.
sentences.korean: 예를 들어, 스케줄을 안 읽어서 잘못된 시간에 출근하면, 그건 네 탓이야.

sentences.english: If you fail an exam because you didn't prepare, then the failure is on you.
sentences.korean: 준비를 안 해서 시험에 떨어지면, 그 실패도 네 탓이야.

sentences.english: And if I'm late again after this, then it's definitely on me!
sentences.korean: 그리고 이 다음에 또 늦으면, 확실히 내 탓이지!

sentences.english: Let's hear some examples of people using 'it's on you'.
sentences.korean: 사람들이 'it's on you'를 쓰는 예시를 들어보자.

quiz.question: What does '일정, 스케줄' mean in English?

sentences.english: If you didn't prepare for your speech, and it went badly, that's on you.
sentences.korean: 발표 준비를 안 했는데 망했다면, 그건 네 탓이야.

sentences.english: It was obviously going to happen.
sentences.korean: 당연히 그렇게 될 수밖에.

sentences.english: I've already eaten. If you haven't gone shopping and you don't have any food, that's on you.
sentences.korean: 나는 이미 먹었어. 장을 안 봐서 먹을 게 없으면, 그건 네 탓이야.

sentences.english: I told you to wear a coat, and you didn't, and now you've got a cold.
sentences.korean: 코트 입으라고 했는데, 안 입었잖아.

sentences.english: Well, that's on you.
sentences.korean: 이제 감기 걸렸지. 그건 네 탓이야.

sentences.english: A different way to use 'on someone' to talk about responsibility is when you offer to pay for something, usually food or drink.
sentences.korean: 'on someone'을 책임과 관련해서 쓰는 다른 방법이 있는데, 음식이나 음료를 사겠다고 할 때예요.

sentences.english: You can say 'this is on me' to mean that you'll pay for it.
sentences.korean: 'This is on me'라고 하면 내가 낸다는 뜻이에요.

sentences.english: Yes. If you invite people out for a meal, you can say 'Don't worry, this is on me' to say that you'll pay for it – you'll take responsibility for it.
sentences.korean: 맞아. 사람들을 식사에 초대했으면, '걱정 마, 내가 낼게'라고 말할 수 있어 — 네가 비용을 책임진다는 뜻이야.

sentences.english: Phil, seeing as you were late today, that's on you.
sentences.korean: 필, 오늘 늦은 건 네 탓이니까.

sentences.english: Then, I think the next round of coffees should be on you as well!
sentences.korean: 그러면 다음 커피는 네가 사야 할 것 같은데!

quiz.question: What does '네 잘못이야, 네 책임이야' mean in English?

sentences.english: I hope you've brought your wallet!
sentences.korean: 지갑 가져왔길 바라!

sentences.english: I have, yes. See you next time, on time.
sentences.korean: 가져왔어, 응. 다음에 봐, 제시간에.

sentences.english: Bye!
sentences.korean: 안녕!

sentences.english: Bye bye!
sentences.korean: 안녕!
